des: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Oswald Peraza scores. Zach Neto to 3rd. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.
Mike Trout singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brice Matthews. Logan O'Hoppe scores. Oswald Peraza to 3rd. Zach Neto to 2nd.
Zach Neto walks. Logan O'Hoppe to 3rd. Oswald Peraza to 2nd.
Oswald Peraza singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Isaac Paredes. Logan O'Hoppe to 2nd.
Josh Lowe flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.
Jo Adell flies out to left fielder Brice Matthews.
Jorge Soler homers (1) on a line drive to left field. Mike Trout scores.
Nolan Schanuel flies out to shortstop Carlos Correa.
Zach Neto grounds out, second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker.
Oswald Peraza homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Logan O'Hoppe grounds into a double play, shortstop Carlos Correa to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Josh Lowe out at 2nd. Logan O'Hoppe out at 1st.
Jo Adell grounds out, shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker.
Yoán Moncada grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Jorge Soler out at 2nd. Yoán Moncada out at 1st.
Nolan Schanuel flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.
Mike Trout flies out sharply to right fielder Cam Smith.
